heading: Step 1: Set up and initialize the .NET/C# project for the query.
body:
- Create a new directory called `embedded-documents-query` and
  initialize your project with the dotnet new command.

  ```bash
  mkdir embedded-documents-facet-query
  cd embedded-documents-facet-query
  dotnet new console
  ```

- Add the .NET/C# Driver to your project as a dependency.

  ```bash
  dotnet add package MongoDB.Driver
  ```

codeBlocks.content:
mkdir embedded-documents-facet-query
cd embedded-documents-facet-query
dotnet new console
